_notes: PLACEHOLDER VALUES: ascAppId and appleTeamId in submit.production.ios must be filled before first iOS build/submit.
google-play-service-account.json must be created from Google Play Console before Android submit.
Set EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL as an EAS environment variable for preview and production; app.config.js rejects missing or placeholder deployment URLs.
RuStore: build with 'eas build --profile rustore --platform android', then upload APK manually at developers.rustore.ru. Requires RUSTORE_KEY_ID and RUSTORE_KEY_SECRET env vars for signing.

Huawei AppGallery: build with 'eas build --profile huawei --platform android', then upload APK manually at developer.huawei.com/consumer/en/appgallery. Requires HUAWEI_CLIENT_ID and HUAWEI_CLIENT_SECRET for API upload.
